title: Bunny Hop
description: Changes the rules of movement in Minecraft
body:
## Bunny Hop

The Bunny Hop mechanic has been added to the game, changing the rules of movement. Now, as the player moves, their movements change, allowing them to gain and maintain high speed.

## How to use

* After jumping at high speed, the character slides along the block, maintaining momentum.
* You can change direction in the air, allowing for sharp turns at high speed.

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
